{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-347", "name": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature"}], "description": "The AVX2 implementation of ML-DSA verification incorrectly implemented
the `use_hint` function, mishandling an edge case that should lead to
signature rejection.

## Impact
An attacker could make the ML-DSA verifier accept a crafted invalid
signature under a maliciously generated verification key, if the AVX2
implementation is used.

## Mitigation
From version `0.0.9` the edge case is handled correctly and invalid
signatures are rejected.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fhvh-vw7h-9xf3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T16:18:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhvh-vw7h-9xf3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fhvh-vw7h-9xf3"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-19T16:18:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/C2SP/wycheproof/pull/234", "https://github.com/cryspen/libcrux/pull/1398", "https://github.com/tink-crypto/tink-go/pull/48", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0125.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhvh-vw7h-9xf3"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cryspen/libcrux", "summary": " libcrux-ml-dsa: Signature Verification on AVX2 Platforms Mishandles Edge Case", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:18:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhvh-vw7h-9xf3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "libcrux-ml-dsa"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.9"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: libcrux-ml-dsa: Signature Verification on AVX2 Platforms Mishandles Edge Case
